title: Flesh for Pets
description: Simple resourcepack changing rotten flesh to dog food. Yum!
body:
Every dog longs for a real treat... They're SICK of raw beef and steak and porkchops and everything else. They want a real snack. Some special food made just for them. Good thing Bear's Mystery Meat Dog Food is here! A wonderful concoction that dogs go nuts for! Just... don't think too hard about what's in it.

A simple resourcepack I made a while back that turns rotten flesh into dog food. That's all.
